name: 24" x 24" 'Well Hello There' Framed Wall Poster - Threshold™: Modern Lithograph Art, Polystyrene Frame
description:
The 24" x 24" 'Well Hello There' Framed Wall Poster from Threshold™ is an instant mood-lifter. In classic black and white, this friendly llama in a sleek black frame greets you playfully. This 24" x 24" 'Well Hello There' Framed Wall Poster from Threshold™ works for any space that you want to lighten up—living room, home office or patio.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
